title: Looking for a consultant to help with best practice workflow for digital marketing / design agency setup
excerpt: We would like to hire a consultant/specialist to help us link our boards and process. Looking for a specialist who can help with best practice workflow for digital marketing / design agency setup.

posts.author: spark (Carol Lobo)
posts.cookedHtml: We would like to hire a consultant/specialist to help us link our boards and process. Looking for a specialist who can help with best practice workflow for digital marketing / design agency setup.

posts.author: plyngdal (Peter Lyngdal)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Carol,

I work for a consulting firm called MMC based in Minnesota that has optimized our back office practices with extensive Monday usage. Would love to connect and hear what you are looking to do and understand your needs. Feel free to reach out at: plyngdal@mmcmsp.com

Looking forward to hearing from you!

Best,
Peter Lyngdal

posts.author: spark (Carol Lobo)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Peter, can you tell me what is the nature of business for MMC please?

posts.author: plyngdal (Peter Lyngdal)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our specialization areas include:

  • Performance Management & Reporting
  • Project Management
  • Organizational Change Management (OCMx)
  • Strategic Development & Decision Making
  • Process Improvement
  • System Implementations

This includes completely unifying our back office efforts using Monday.com, as well as deploying it with some of our clients for use on their projects and initiatives.

posts.author: spark (Carol Lobo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Sounds very comprehensive. For now I am looking for an industry specific user to help with our current workflows. I will reach out to you down the track.
Thank you

posts.author: cdann (Carol Dann)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

I’d be happy to discuss some strategy with you, being the main point of contact for Monday.com at my company. We use it for a variety of different lines of business, including Social Calendars, Product Development and Marketing programs. Seems like there’s some synergy with what you’re looking for. Please let me know if you’re interested in connecting.

Stay safe!
Carol

posts.author: Neille (Neille Hoffman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Carol: I’d love to connect and hear more about how you are implementing monday.com, I am having a hard time getting the rest of my company to utilize monday.com. I see the power in it but guess I’m missing quite a bit as well.

Thanks,
Neille Hoffman

posts.author: zamandanoel (Amanda Cabrera)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, just curious, did you find anyone to help you set this up? I’m looking for the same thing now.
